content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.69%, Bank Nifty -1.13%, VIX +3.6% to 17.22 — broad index weakness with selective earnings-driven outperformers (COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO, PIDILITIND, WOCKPHARMA, SRF, LUPIN, BHARATFORG). Book is 58% deployed across 12 names, mostly held intraday-to-1-day with strong Q4 prints. Priority is locking gains on COFORGE (+8.3%) and PNBHOUSING (+10.5%) via tighter trailing SLs and trimming losers (LUPIN at SL).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: SL 1066.24 already trails ~1.9% below CMP 1085.40, healthy gap above 1.0% floor. Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, AAA upgrade catalyst pending. Target 1135 still ~4.6% away. No-op MODIFY avoidance: keeping SL/target same — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1066.24 sits 1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact (Q4 beat, AAA-rating optionality). Hold to target 1135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -0.6%, SL 121 is 2.7% below CMP 124.43. VIX rising supports gold thesis. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 812 to 818 (still 1.2% below CMP 827.60, respects 1.0% trail-gap floor). Q4 beat (PAT +14%, rev +22%), 52w high zone, MOFSL 15% upside. Lock in some downside while letting target run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.3% unrealized, CMP 1360.30. Stored SL 1338.68 already trails 1.6% below CMP — within 1.0% floor and is a no-op vs stored. Switching to HOLD instead per no-op rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1338.68 = 1.6% below CMP 1360.30, locks in entry+gain. Target 1450 = +6.6% upside still open. Q4 PAT 612cr (vs 261), order book $1.75B. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL 2960 → 3030 (locks small gain above entry 3025, 1.4% below CMP 3073.70 — respects 1.0% trail-gap floor). FY26 PAT +41.8%, defence order momentum intact. Target 3225 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Loosen-prevention: stored SL 832 sits only 0.9% below CMP 840.15 — BELOW the 1.0% trail-gap floor, will self-stop on noise. CANNOT loosen SL per rules. Switching to HOLD with caveat — accept the tight stop or pre-emptively EXIT. Choosing HOLD given Q4 beat thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 832 is tight (0.9% below CMP) but cannot be loosened. Q4 thesis intact (rev +11%, PAT +11%, SIP +46%). If SL fires on noise, accept it; otherwise target 875 still +4.1% upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1445 = 2.4% below CMP 1481.20. Q4 PAT +37% beat, EBITDA margin +310bp, dividend 1150%. Hold to target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 24,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 2366.20 vs stored SL 2370 — CMP has BREACHED SL (2366.20 < 2370 by 3.8 points). Position is at/below SL trigger; exit cleanly at market rather than wait for slippage on SL trigger. Q4 result was actually strong (PAT +87%, EBITDA margin 33.6%) but stock failed at 52w high 2475 and reversed -4.4% intraday — sell-the-news. Realize -₹2,142 loss and free capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1580 = 1.8% below CMP 1610.90. Q4 PAT +317% YoY, technical breakout. Hold to target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL 2740 → 2750 (1.2% below CMP 2784, respects 1.0% floor). Q4 PAT FY26 +47%, fluorochemicals strength. Target 2920 unchanged (+4.9%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 9000 = 1.4% below CMP 9127. Q4 record revenue, dividend Rs 47, MOFSL TP 9800. Hold to target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1955 = 2.3% below CMP 2001.90. Defence rev +46%, Q4 PAT optically -17% but on exceptional items. Hold to target 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 4,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 10760.00,
      "stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "target": 11260.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 standalone PAT +34%, consolidated PAT +103%, revenue +41%. Buyback @ Rs 12,000 (14% premium to close) is a hard floor. Dividend Rs 150 record date May 29. Fresh 52w high breakout on volume. Position size: 4 × 10760 = ₹43,040 (~4.3% of portfolio). SL 10440 = -3% (R 320), Target 11260 = +4.6% (R 500). R:R = 500/320 = 1.56. Risk budget: 4.3% × 3% = 0.13% of portfolio — well under 0.5% cap. Cluster check: no auto-cluster overlap (BHARATFORG is auto-components/defence-tilted, distinct driver)."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 3358 minutes (>2 days) ago — should have been broker-cancelled by EOD same day. Flagging as stale; will let it expire/cancel via order hygiene. No new action."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

    },
    {

    },
    {

    },
    {

    },

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 2750.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten 10 pts; respects 1.2% trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

  "watchlist_notes": "DABUR / ASIANPAINT / PERSISTENT / INDUSINDBK / TATATECH watched but not admitted: (a) DABUR — strong Q4 but already overweight FMCG via MARICO; (b) ASIANPAINT — paint sector input cost ambiguity (price hikes vs crude), pass; (c) PERSISTENT — IT exposure already via COFORGE; (d) INDUSINDBK — governance overhang (SFIO/SEBI per Rule 13), HARD NO_ACTION; (e) TATATECH — extreme volume but unclear catalyst, await next session; (f) BAJAJ-AUTO admitted given buyback floor + dividend + Q4 print; (g) WOCKPHARMA / PIDILITIND / SRF / COFORGE / MARICO all admitted earlier and tracking. Capital after LUPIN exit + BAJAJ-AUTO add: deployed ~58-60%, near soft target.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book carries 12 names with 58% deployment, today P&L +1.34%. Strategy: lock gains via SL trails (MARICO, GRSE, SRF), exit broken thesis (LUPIN at SL), add one high-conviction earnings-buyback play (BAJAJ-AUTO). Cluster discipline respected — no Power/Banking concentration. CAMS SL is uncomfortably tight (0.9%); cannot loosen, accepting potential stopout. VIX +3.6% argues against aggressive new admits beyond BAJAJ-AUTO."
}
